ground_truth:
App: **Jan** (v0.8.2). **Three columns**: left nav sidebar + middle settings-category column (e.g. Appearance/Assistants-style entries) + right settings content. Top-right corner has the macOS traffic-light dots **plus extra icons** (download/grid/split-view). Provider-list entries carry **colored per-provider icons**.
- **Left nav**: window-control dots; items `New Chat` `⌘N`, `New Projects` `⌘P`, `Search` `⌘K`, `Hub`, `Settings` (active) — **keyboard shortcuts ARE shown** next to these items. Sections `Chats` (recent: "Build a PacMan Clone…", "Translate the following…", "interpreter"), `INTEGRATIONS` (`Experimental` tag, `MCP Servers`, `Claude Code`), `MODEL PROVIDERS` (`+` add; `LOCAL`: `Llama.cpp`, `MLX`; `REMOTE`: `OpenAI`, `Azure`, `Anthropic`, `OpenRouter`, `Mistral`, `Groq` (last fully-visible entry), `x.AI` (last entry, **truncated** — only the top ~40% visible; models often render it "xAI")).
- **Right (Settings)**: sections `General` (`App Version` `v0.8.2`; `Automatic Update Check` toggle **on** + button `Check for Updates` **enabled**; `Language` dropdown `English`), `Data Folder` (`App Data` path `/Users/frederic/Library/Application Support/Jan/data` + `Change Location`; `App Logs` + `Show in Finder` / `Open Logs`), `Advanced` (`Jan CLI` at `/Users/frederic/.local/bin/jan` + `Uninstall`; `Reset To Factory Settings` + red `Reset` button).

Here is the detailed breakdown of the UI screenshot:

### (1) Overall Layout
*   **Left Sidebar:** A vertical navigation menu containing main categories (Chats, Settings) and sub-items.
*   **Middle Column:** A secondary navigation list for specific settings categories (General, Appearance, etc.).
*   **Right Panel:** The main content area displaying detailed settings options and controls.

### (2) Visible Components & Text Labels
**Left Sidebar:**
*   New Chat
*   New Projects
*   Search
*   Hub
*   Settings
*   Chats
*   Build a PacMan Clone ...
*   Translate the following...
*   interpreter

**Middle Column:**
*   Settings
*   General
*   Appearance
*   Assistants
*   Attachments
*   Local API Server

*   Azure

*   OpenRouter
*   Mistral
*   Groq
*   xAI

**Right Panel:**
*   General
*   App Version (v0.8.2)
*   Automatic Update Check
*   Check for Updates
*   Language (English)
*   Data Folder
*   App Data
*   App Logs
*   Advanced
*   Jan CLI
*   Reset To Factory Settings

### (3) Feedback, Status, or Error Messages
*   **App Version:** Displays "v0.8.2" indicating the current software version.
*   **Experimental Tag:** The "INTEGRATIONS" section has a blue "Experimental" badge.
*   **Warning Text:** Under "Reset To Factory Settings," it states: "This action is irreversible and recommended only if the application is corrupted."

### (4) Interactive Elements & States
*   **Toggle Switch:** "Automatic Update Check" is toggled ON (orange).
*   **Button:** "Check for Updates" (disabled/grayed out).
*   **Dropdown:** "Language" set to "English".
*   **Button:** "Change Location" (next to App Data).
*   **Button:** "Show in Finder" (next to App Logs).
*   **Button:** "Open Logs" (next to App Logs).
*   **Button:** "Uninstall" (next to Jan CLI).
*   **Button:** "Reset" (red, next to Reset To Factory Settings).
